pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i keep waking up thinking i hear him moving around in the other room, but then i remember. it's like i'm just a ghost walking through these empty halls. i don't even know why i bother getting up in the morning anymore. nothing feels real.

pool.baseline: i was just staring at the stars and it hit me. nothing we do actually matters. like, in a billion years the sun is gone and the universe is just cold and dead. everything we feel, every struggle, every stupid little achievement... it's all just a temporary glitch in the void. it feels so pointless to even keep trying.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm typing this. everything is just... gone. the lab results, the funding, the last four years of my life. it feels like i'm just staring at a wall and there's no way through it. i'm just so tired of fighting for something that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: the candlelight is flickering out... and honestly, i dont think i care if it does. he's gone, and with him, everything that made this wretched life worth the breathing. i feel like a ghost already. just a hollow shell wandering these halls. it would be so much more peaceful to just... let the shadows take me, wouldnt it? to just fade away into the night and never have to feel this ache again.

pool.baseline: i lost everything. the fund collapsed after the market took that dip and now the debt is... it’s more than i can even look at. i can't go back home. i can't face my family or anyone looking at me knowing i blew it all. i just feel like there's no way out of this shame.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im so much for everyone to deal with lately. everything takes so much longer than it used to and i can see it in my kids faces. they're so tired. i dont want to be the reason they're so worn out.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. everything is so heavy and there's no point in even trying to fix it anymore.
